CustomField.description: This field is used in the fieldset TR1__Power_Notes_Tableview as a cue to allow the PowerNotes table view component to show the source if the field is in the displayed fields section.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is used in the fieldset TR1__Power_Notes_Tableview as a cue to allow the PowerNotes table view component to show the source if the field is in the displayed fields section.
CustomField.label: Source
